title: verbascum × montenegrinum
intro: Verbascum × montenegrinum, also known as the Montenegrin mullein, is a hybrid species of the verbascum genus, a type of flowering plant native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, making it an effective remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × montenegrinum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from coughs and colds to skin irritations and digestive issues.
